description: Same source IP was involved in suspicious activity across 2 hosts: WINDOWS-LAB, UBUNTU-LAB.
recommended_action: Prioritize investigation of this source IP. Review all related host logs, check whether this was authorized testing, and isolate affected systems if compromise is suspected.
framework_mapping: NIST CSF: DE.AE Anomalies and Events, RS.AN Analysis | NIST SP 800-61: Incident Analysis and Prioritization | MITRE ATT&CK: T1021 Remote Services, T1078 Valid Accounts

description: A successful login occurred after repeated failed login attempts for the same source, host, and user.
recommended_action: Treat as possible account compromise. Confirm whether the login was authorized, review user activity after login, reset credentials if suspicious, and preserve related logs.
framework_mapping: NIST CSF: DE.AE Anomalies and Events, RS.AN Analysis | NIST SP 800-61: Detection, Analysis, and Prioritization | MITRE ATT&CK: T1110 Brute Force, T1078 Valid Accounts

description: 7 failed login attempts observed for the same source, host, and user.
recommended_action: Investigate the source IP and targeted account. Consider password reset, account lockout review, rate limiting, and preserving logs as evidence.
framework_mapping: NIST CSF: DE.AE Anomalies and Events, DE.CM Security Continuous Monitoring | NIST SP 800-61: Detection and Analysis | MITRE ATT&CK: T1110 Brute Force

description: Privilege-related activity observed after suspicious login activity for the same user and host.
recommended_action: Review commands or administrative actions performed by this user. Check whether privilege use was authorized and preserve command/session evidence.
framework_mapping: NIST CSF: DE.CM Security Continuous Monitoring, RS.AN Analysis | NIST SP 800-61: Detection and Analysis | MITRE ATT&CK: Privilege Escalation

description: 6 Windows network/SMB-style failed login attempts observed for the same source, host, and user.
recommended_action: Investigate the source IP and targeted account. Consider password reset, account lockout review, rate limiting, and preserving logs as evidence.
framework_mapping: NIST CSF: DE.AE Anomalies and Events, DE.CM Security Continuous Monitoring | MITRE ATT&CK: T1110 Brute Force, T1021 Remote Services

recommended_action: Review only if repeated later or linked with other suspicious activity.
framework_mapping: NIST CSF: DE.CM Security Continuous Monitoring
